description: Example mapping from natural language intent to MCP tool invocation for a multi-provider MCP server

mappings.notes: Always validate inputs before calling. Return both the numeric result and a short explanation.

mappings.intent: search for current information on the web
mappings.notes: Ground all claims in the returned sources. Prefer recent results.

privacy: All credentials and MCP server configuration remain strictly local. Only the minimal serialized tool arguments are sent to the MCP server.
